subject: math
activity_templates: A 4th-grade long-division worksheet. 4 long-division problems (e.g. '672 ÷ 4', '945 ÷ 7') using standard long-division notation with ample workspace. Header reads 'Long Division'. {{character}} gives a thumbs up.
A 4th-grade division-with-remainders worksheet. 6 problems (e.g. '37 ÷ 5 = __ R __'). Each problem has workspace and two answer boxes (quotient, remainder). {{character}} thinks.
A 4th-grade division word-problem worksheet with 4 multi-step kid-friendly problems involving division with remainders. Workspace and answer box for each. {{character}} reads.
A mixed division practice worksheet with 8 problems in a 2x4 grid (some with remainders, some without) in standard long-division layout. {{character}} waves at the top.
